calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion And Motion To Confirm Arbitration Award
Off Calendar Apr-07-2026 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: PETITIONER GRELLAS SHAH LLP'S MOTION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD

No appearances. The court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: Petitioner Grellas Shah LLP's motion to confirm arbitration award is granted. Good cause shown and no opposition filed. Judgment shall be enter in favor of Grellas Shah in accordance with the final award issued by the Arbitrator in AAA case number 01-24-0007-8561. Order and judgment are signed for review. Judge: Harold E. Kahn, Clerk: E. Larnauti, Not Reported (301/HEK)
